title: Kirmay clan
content:
{{Top|ca|leg}} {{Organization |image= |name=Kirmay clan |type= |founder= |leader= |subgroup= |headquarters= |locations=[[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Do you know where [Ghez Hokan] is?''"
"''They're down at the farm the Kirmay clan used to own before Hokan sold them to Trandoshans. About fifty, maybe sixty of them. What are you going to do to us?|[[Darman Skirata|RC-1336]] and a Qiiluran villager|}} The '''Kirmay clan''' was a group of individuals who owned a [[Kirmay clan's farm|farm]] near the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Imbraani]] on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Qiilura system/Legends|Qiilura system]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]] by [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'', which includes the mention of the Kirmay clan, in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. The clan lost the property when [[Ghez Hokan]], a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] serving in the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], [[Slavery/Legends|sold]] the group to [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Slaver/Legends|enslavers]]. The farm was later repurposed as a staging area for fifty to sixty of Hokan's [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], as estimated by a [[Qiiluran]] [[Unidentified villager (Qiilura)|villager]]. ==Behind the scenes== The Kirmay clan was mentioned in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact|Hard Contact]]'', the first novel in the ''[[Republic Commando]]'' series written by [[Karen Traviss]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kirmay-Clan }} [[Category:Clans]]
